name: geoip-updater
description: geoip-updater keeps MaxMind GeoIP2/GeoLite2 databases up to date, downloading the configured editions on a cron schedule as a single host-level service.

notes.text: A MaxMind License Key is required (free GeoLite2 account). Provide it when prompted during install; it is stored in /etc/geoip-updater/geoip-updater.env.
Downloaded databases are stored in /opt/geoip-updater/data. Point other services (firewalls, proxies, analytics) at that path.
